review_title: Was not impressed, until I bought it
description: I feel this is straight forward and easy to use for beginner for SEO and Keyword research
author: Ryan C.
pros: I was initially not impressed with it, due to some reviews and questions asked are showing that the solution is not mature yet with some bugs and so on. However, after I tested out the trial, i decided to get it, since there is a refund period. I made the right choice! With the proper extensive testing across multiple domains and competitors, with a few days of proper data populating. I am quite impressed and finally see the value and the direction it is going toward. I am early looking forward to the features stated in the roadmap, and most of all I like how responsive their team is. Support or question sometime have delays or slow, but to me it is understandable since we are working all in different time zone, and also weekends, and COVID19 really do impact a lot. Also it is comforting when you do see the team adding minor features, big fixes, and response to issue, or at least acknowledge the issues exist. Being active on their own blog and FB group is a big plus, some of the guide and articles put out is quite user friendly for those who just starting out. All in all, I am glad that I bought it and tested it out properly across multiple domain & with a few days of data populating and monitoring.
cons: Site Audit have some bugs, or obviously weird result. But the others category of fixes did help me found out few of the issues I wasn't aware of. Looking forward to the improved version of the site audit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: RankTracker is a great SEO and SERP analysis tool
description: Pretty solid tool with emphasis on getting the right keyword data so that you can create the best SEO strategy and right decisions for your business and your clients.
author: Jay P.
pros: RankTracker bring real SEO and SERP data analytics to a clean, well-thought UI providing a great user experience.
cons: As a product in its infancy, there are some UI bugs to work out. However, their analytics are spot-on compared to other SEO tools with higher-tier pricing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great at First, But Now Feels Like a Scam
description: I purchased a lifetime license for this software through AppSumo. I was really impressed with this tool when I first got it—so much so that I even purchased add-ons. However, since last year, a permanent “Upgrade to Proceed” banner has made it unusable. I reached out to support, and they assured me it would be fixed, but nothing has changed. Forcing lifetime deal users to pay again is unfair and misleading. Disappointing experience.
author: Mario K.
pros: It was really good when I just got this software.
cons: I think their business practices as tarnished their reputation for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: One of the best keyword tracking tools in the world
description: It helps me track the growth of keywords on my website every day. I am extremely satisfied with their rank tracking feature.
author: Tang H.
pros: Ranktracker is the all-in-one platform for SEO that I was looking for. I love how it combines everything you need into one place, including rank tracking, keyword research, site testing, and more. The feature that impresses me the most is still rank tracking, I like its user interface and data fetching speed.
cons: I think they need to improve on the keyword research and audit feature.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Well Rounded SEO Tool
description: I like RankTracker. I have tried to use other tools that were either too complicated to make use of the data, or too expensive with constant upsells. RankTracker is a great fit for my use cases.
author: Lisa F.
pros: The Competition Analysis feature is my favorite. At a glance I can see where my customers' business stands against local competition. SEO Audit is quite in-depth for a tool that is more geared toward keyword and rank tracking.
cons: Although reports look great, I am hoping for more robust descriptions. Not all features are intuitive; I had to do a lot of random clicking to figure out how to drill down to the information I need especially in the SEO Audit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best scam I saw in 20 years in online business
description: This company is just a big scam. They offer you a good deal "lifetime" and then when they get all your data they ask money to get access. Ransomware in another word... I'm Dr. Willy Portier, the owner of [sensitive content hidden] and this review is not fake. In case of doubt, feel free to contact me by Linkedin...
author: Dr Willy P.
pros: That was doing more or less the job during many months
cons: The fact that app becomes a ransomware by stopping the license which I bought lifetime. And now they have all our data.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: For Keyword research powerful tools with simple interface
description: In one word if I have to say about Rank tracker, I must say " Powerful with simple interface". It provides me all SEO features to complete my project like SEO checklist, auditing in such an easy way. Moreover, anyone can quickly understand without any hassle. I tested with other similar tools, In my opinion Rank Tracker is one the best among them.
author: Khan Md Mohaiuminul Islam S.
pros: By using the Rank tracker, I track my website keyword's actual organic search position. Comparing with other similar tools I get that its provided mot accurate data based on organic research. Rank tracker has well designed & very easy user-friendly interface. In the Rank Tracker, I like most, the result I get from my search is very easy to understand. With the Audit feature and SEO checklist, which is cool for me, I can able to provide services to my clients more accurately. I got all the features in APPSUMO at a such cheap rate, that's why I can easily test this tool, the result is pretty good for me. They recently add GMB position search option, it's something interesting.
cons: I was wondering, they need to improve the keyword difficulty section, we need to click on the small icon after search to view the keyword difficulties. They should add this in the default search section.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Powerful Rank Tracker and Keyword Analysis Tool
description: Amazing so far. The tool is fairly new but the UI is really great. The workflow for domain setup is very smooth and logical.
author: Andrew L.
pros: Very easy to read and analyze the data. Stat seem to be quite accurate. Many options for search engines and desktop v mobile tracking.
cons: Currently the keyword difficulty is not the easiest to determine as it is hidden and has to be manually requested. This should be solved soon according to support. Unless you’re doing crazy amounts of keyword research in one session its not that big of a deal.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Accurate Rank Tracking Software
description: More visibility for clients from SEO work.
author: Sam P.
pros: This is a very good rank tracker with accurate results. Have shared the dashboards with clients and they are happy the rankings match actual positioning for keywords.
cons: Not many issues here, it does what it is marketed as and will only get better with age. Be good to be able to connect search console and analytics. Hopefully this is a feature that gets implemented soon.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Terrible service - do not use.
description: Utterly disappointing from start to finish. I signed up for the annual plan, realized within 24 hours that I'd made a mistake, and immediately requested a refund. Ranktracker flat-out refused, hiding behind anti-consumer fine print instead of basic fairness. Paying a full year’s fee for something I can’t use feels like daylight robbery. Their CEO was dismissive, their policies inflexible, and the whole experience left me feeling cheated. Avoid Ranktracker at all costs. There are plenty of tools that value their customers more than their cancellation clauses.
author: Vuk I.
pros: Absolutely nothing. I would most like to be able to get a refund (requested within 24 hours, mind you), for a whole year's subscription, which they refuse based on anti-consumer practices. Terrible.
cons: The fact that we were not be able to get a refund (which we requested ASAP), for a whole year's subscription, which they refuse based on anti-consumer practices. Terrible.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Before who you get in bed with. It won't be pretty when you wake up.
description: Terrible, would never recommend. Criminal business practises and with a shady [sensitive content hidden].
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Good UI, well thought out tools and relatively accurate.
cons: This is not a company you should trust with your business or data. The [sensitive content hidden], has no issue with using deceptive tactics in order to rope in users and leaving them in the dust without hesitation. Here are several examples (and it he chooses to flag this review, I'm more than happy to provide proof): 1) Placing lifetime deal users behind a paywall masquerading as a "Support Plan". Several years ago, [sensitive content hidden] ran a lifetime deal promotion campaign with AppSumo. These licenses started from $49 with the promise of providing lifetime access to their software for an early investment to beta software, essentially. Shortly after, [sensitive content hidden] began to strip access to our accounts and in order to receive "priority support" to restore access, and we had to purchase a "Support plan". Over the last year, I was given the same boilerplate response from [sensitive content hidden] and have not had access restored since. I've tried giving him the benefit of the doubt but unfortunately here I am writing this review. 2) Promising features to get the sale. Prior to purchasing a lifetime deal license, I asked if he was going to include Amazon rank tracking in the future. Without hesitation, his response was a solid yes. 2 years later, it was clear there was no intention to do so. He's money hungry and will do whatever it takes for financial gain and getting users trapped in his ecosystem. They key for [sensitive content hidden] is to squeeze every bit of money out of his users without offering anything in return and goes about it in a shameless way. From an objective standpoint, the software works and works well. I enjoyed the features and the visibility it offered to my SEO, HOWEVER, it comes down to which horse you're willing to back in a space with so many options. [sensitive content hidden] is someone with vision but lacks deeply in ethics and values as a founder in this space. With so much competition and comparable platforms, I don't see the incentive in investing the time and effort to integrate Ranktracker as a core piece in your SEO toolkit and initiatives. The trust isn't there and to wake up one day and everything you've put into setting it up the workflow to be gone is a bit too unsettling for my blood. [sensitive content hidden], do better. Everyone else - buyer beware and know who you're getting into bed with. It's not pretty once you wake up.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: An Amazing Rank Tracking Tool At Affordable Price
description: I used to run my keyword tracking at Serprobot which is a dedicated keyword tracking tool. Then one day I found Ranktracker in Appsumo deal. It was offering LTD and I needed a lifetime rank tracking tool for monitoring day to day improvement of my site. I took the chance and bought it's tier-1 deal where I can track up to 150 keywords, explore 1000 keyword ideas and can analyze 40 competitors. I started using it and falling in love with that. Now I repent for why not I went for tier-2 deal!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I mainly purchased this rank tracking tool for monitoring day to day position of my site's keyword. What I get is extremely out of my expectation. Along with rank tracking feature it also helps in keywords idea generation, competitor analysis, content gap analysis and what I loved most it helps in auditing site. The 'Ranktracker' facilitates tracking keywords based on device, country and language along with traffic each keyword is getting & SERP of ranked sites and it also provide KD score based on number of linking domains. I also liked its keyword research feature. I just needed to place the seed keyword in its keyword finder and it came up with a bunch of ideas, suggestions and related terms in few seconds which helped me lot in keyword selection to write the article on. You can select the country also while researching for keywords which is awesome. Another feature I loved is its reporting feature. For those who works for clients can easily send SEO reports daily, weekly & monthly to any email address which adds an extra layer of value for this tool. Site audit feature is a game changer for this tool. It crawls the site and expose every SEO issues to be fixed in auditing section. Ranktracker has a great customer support team who responds almost instantly and posts tutorials & blogs on how to effectively use this tool & winning first position in search engine. Overall it has been a great decision to purchase this tool. It is worthy of recommendation.
cons: No tool is perfect. Ranktracker has also some problems I encountered & I hope they will fix these. The most important problem I faced is delay in showing results. It takes up to 30 seconds sometimes even more to show the results which is quite boring. I think the organic traffic they show beside each keyword tracked, doesn't show the actual result. Ranktracker need to add backlink explorer feature as it wants to emerge as an SEO tool in the market. And also it should take steps to develop a content optimization feature. If they can develop that I think this tool with compete with Ahrefs in future.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Must-have tool for SEO!
description: My SEO strategy got much clearer since I am using Ranktracker. It helps me to test what works and what doesn't, as well as find new niches I can write for. Support is very responsive and helpful. All in all great product, happy to be their customer! :)
author: Philip F.
pros: The keyword rank tracker, keyword finder, and backlink monitor are my favorite features. They are very powerful and well constructed. I tested various similar SEO tools and Ranktracker definitely stands out in regards to these 3 and the beautiful user interface. That's not all, the SERP checker surprised me a lot and is extremely helpful in so many ways! For newbies in the SEO field, the SEO Checklist is a good start, too! Thus, it can definitely be recommended for advanced and beginner users.
cons: I don't use the website audit a lot but it seems like it is currently not working (support told me they are working on it). I hope in the future it is possible to include all the data (possibly) in the report. That is a missing feature I would like to see a lot. But that's just a minor idea. It's a great product!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: They've thrown Appsumo users under the bus
description: At first, it was really good. Very easy to set up and use. As someone with no background in SEO, I found it to be really insightful and helpful. Alas, now that they've made it completely inaccessible, Ranktracker is now worthless.
author: Grant M.
pros: Ranktracker was great at tracking keywords and checking the status of my website in comparison to the general market.
cons: It's completely inaccessible. No matter which link I click when logged in, it takes me to the 'plans' page. This is the case for the thousands of people who paid for Ranktracker through AppSumo. I've reached out to support, and I know many others have (I've seen many posts / comments in a software group I'm in), but they refuse to do anything about it. They've basically just taken our money and said they won't do anything unless we pay more for a support plan. I never reached out to support for anything before this, but I can't even use the tool (even with no support) anymore. Absolute garbage. For reference, I sent this video to [sensitive content hidden] a couple of weeks ago. He said that support will investigate (which is the same response others have received... except for one, who was told that if they pay for the support plan, they might get a response quicker):[sensitive content hidden]
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Dont trust this company
description: Really bad, don't trust these guys. Better use other tools. You can check it on AppSumo, there is a report about them how they violated their terms and want to charge Lifetime Users again and again.
author: Felix S.
pros: The tool itself is okay, pretty buggy, but mostly does the job in the basic functions. The SEO Analysis and website recommendations are totally worthless, keyword tracking is ok, but is cutted to just some keywords. If you want more, you will have to pay again.
cons: The customer service is useless and they are changing paid plans and try to charge you more. When asking them whats going on there, they will just ghost you.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Experience from an SEO'er
description: RT is a solid SERP checker at its core. It's so important not know how a web page ranks, or not as the case may be. But more importantly you need to know what action to take in order to to improve your rankings and that is where rank tracker stands out from other tools in my opinion.
author: Moira S.
pros: The feature that's best in my opinion is the site audit that provides steps you can actually put into action yourself. Rank tracker has a lot of useful features with sufficient information so anyone is able to change and improve their site to get better ranking results. You don't need vast amount of technical knowledge. This is where the product excels in my opinion.
cons: It's relatively new compared to some other SEO tools so there are a few minor bugs and things could be improved a bit. But roadmap is reassuring and there has been significant improvement since I started using it
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: There are better options out there that provide value
description: Not good. It provides little value.
author: Nicholas L.
pros: Some of the features are easy to us which is nice.
cons: Most features are not easy to use and they provide very little value so the ones that are easy to use aren't enough to provide any value. There's not a lot of development going on either which means you're not likely to ever see many benefits.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: A Rollercoaster Experience with Ranktracker
description: While Ranktracker does have its merits - particularly in the keyword research department - the experience has been tainted by unethical practices. I'm left feeling bitter and frankly, quite cheated. I hope others don't have to go through what I did.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Their Keyword Research tool is OK. It's helped me uncover some Keywords. The ranktracker works in the beginning too. You can discover keywords that alligns with your content.
cons: I bought a lifetime deal from Appsumo, which seemed like a fantastic bargain at the time. But after a while, I hit a roadblock. The deal just stopped working, and they forced me to pay again for what I'd already paid for. Talk about a punch in the gut! It felt like buying a car, only to have the dealer come back a year later and say, "Oops, you need to pay again to keep driving."It's not just about the money; it's about trust. This experience has left me feeling deceived and taken advantage of. I mean, when you purchase a lifetime deal, you expect it to last a lifetime, right? Not just until they decide they want more cash.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best value for money in SEO Tools
author: Jannis F.
pros: We have started our SEO efforts from scratch and didn't expect results for a while. With Ranktracker we managed to research keywords that helped us rank within 24 hours on the first page of Google. The keyword research feature and rank tracking are tools we use on a daily basis now.
cons: The website audit still has some bugs. Additionally, the support chat felt very mechanic at times, but since this was raised by myself in another review, they have actually improved massively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SCAM Data held hostage
description: I have been scammed. I have reported them to the Insolvency Service of the UK Government who deals with fraud. I suggest anyone else in the same boat do the same.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nothing, they have locked out all life time subscribers and are extorting $82/year before we can access our data or any functionality we have already paid for.
cons: Holding my data hostage Extorting money from Life Time subscribers Founder actively lying saying a ticket is in when folk have been locked out for 6+ months.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Great all-in-one SEO platform
description: Racktracker is an easy to use platform that can help me develop and maintain a proper SEO strategy for my client websites.
author: Ray M.
pros: Ranktracker offers unlimited domains and users allowing me to setup multiple accounts. As a growing agency, this approach is ideal.
cons: Keyword amounts are small and at the time, the platform only offers daily keyword tracking. The developer roadmap states that there will be a feature to offer scheduled keyword tracking (weekly, monthly) which will greatly increase the value.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Company downgrade accounts, support is inexistent.
description: They downgraded a Lifetime Deal product to a subscription product. I paid my full price, only to be scammed into a subscription. Their behavior is totally against all type of good manner, they don't answer to support. I do not recommend.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nothing anymore, As the software is not accessible to LTD users.
cons: Support is nonexistent. The business choices are worrying. I wouldn't invest my time or project in this company by fear of having everything disappear from one day to the other, unless you pay more.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great Rank Tracker for the Money
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Rank Tracker has been very solid so far. I love the ability to see keyword groupings by page, and how easy it is to manage multiple sites. The team behind it also seems to really care.
cons: It's still in beta, so has gone offline a few times but never more than a couple hours. Also, the mobile experience could be improved by putting the rank and the keyword next to each other. Right now you have to swipe left and right for every single keyword in order to see the ranking. I'm sure they are working on that though!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Appalling Customer Support
description: The software itself seems fine, although they appear to have problems with some implementation. My experience with their customer support is that they look to blame the end-user for unanswered support questions - they do not have a proper ticketing support system in place and when they are questioned, they block you on facebook. The [SENSITIVE CONTENT] also takes angry rants as "threats" and cannot take on any criticism of his "support team", which would actually only appear to be him. Honestly, I would not bother as this prevailing poor attitude underlines and undermines the perceived quality of the product.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: seems like it compares with most of the similar products out there, though not a comprehensive
cons: Appalling customer support systems - for this reason alone I wouldn't bother.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Scammed by RankTracker’s owner
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It’s a decent basic rank tracker for anyone who needs a simple Google rank tracking sortware
cons: RankTracker sold me and a whole bunch of other users an LTD on AppSumo and has now locked us out of the account unless we purchase an “annual support plan”. Atrocious business practice of an otherwise decent piece of software.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
